description_long: This is an adult female figure dressed in a sleeveless crop top and a knee-length flared skirt, standing with arms extended horizontally. The figure has a slender build and is wearing high-heeled shoes. Her hair is styled in a high ponytail, and she appears to be wearing a necklace. The clothing fits closely to the body, with the skirt flaring out slightly from the waist. The facial features are defined, and the overall appearance is that of a casually dressed urban pedestrian. The figure's posture and attire suggest she is ready for a day out in a city environment.
description: A casually dressed adult woman in a crop top and flared skirt, standing with arms outstretched and wearing high heels and a ponytail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the crop top, flared skirt, necklace, and facial features with arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the high ponytail, profile of the face, and the side silhouette of the outfit and heels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the crop top, skirt, and ponytail, with arms extended backward.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, ponytail, and the side outline of the clothing and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless crop top and knee-length flared skirt with a necklace accessory
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: long hair styled in a high ponytail
